nameMeanings.name: Pudsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pudsey (WR Yorks), which is recorded as Podechesai(e) in 1086, Pudekesseya in the 12th century, and Pudekeshay in 1219. The place-name probably derives from an Old English personal name * Pudoc (genitive * Pudoces) + Old English ēg ‘island’. Pudsey stands on the top of a hill, and so in this case ēg may have the sense ‘hill spur, island of good land in moorland’. Alternatively, the final element may be Old English (ge)hæg ‘enclosure’ or hēah ‘high ground, height’.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Pudsey was born about 1449, in Barforth Hall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Ralph Pudsay, was 61 and her mother, Edwina, was 31. She had at least 1 son with Walter Bamfield.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Pudsey est née environ 1449, à Barforth Hall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ralph Pudsay, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Edwina, avait 31 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Walter Bamfield.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Pudseyが約1449年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアバーフォース ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Pudsayは61歳，母Edwinaは31歳であった。彼女はWalter Bamfieldとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Pudsey(이)가 대략 1449년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 바포스 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Pudsay(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Edwina(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 Walter Bamfield(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
